cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So the question is: Jane scheduled 3 appointments with 5 people for tomorrow, which is Tuesday, July 9th, 1972. We need to find the date one week ago from today, and express it in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given from (A) to (F). First, let me make sure I understand the timeline. If tomorrow is Tuesday, July 9, 1972, then today must be Monday, July 8, 1972. Because if tomorrow is Tuesday, then today is the day before, which is Monday. So today is July 8th, 1972. Now, the question asks for the date one week ago from today. That means we need to go back 7 days from July 8th, 1972. Let me count that. Starting from July 8th and subtracting 7 days: July 8 (today) minus 1 day is July 7 (Sunday) Minus 2nd day: July 6 (Saturday) Minus 3rd day: July 5 (Friday) Minus 4th day: July 4 (Thursday) Minus 5th day: July 3 (Wednesday) Minus 6th day: July 2 (Tuesday) Minus 7th day: July 1 (Monday) So one week ago from July 8th is July 1st, 1972. Looking at the options, option (E) is 07/01/1972. So the answer should be option (E). But let me double-check to make sure I didn't make a mistake. Another way to calculate is to subtract 7 days from July 8. Since July has 31 days, going back 7 days from the 8th would be the 1st. 8 - 7 = 1. So yes, July 1st. The year is still 1972 because we're not crossing into June. Looking at the other options, (A) is the date of tomorrow, which is given. (D) is May 13th, which seems unrelated. (C) is July 1st, 2008, which is way later. (F) is August 12th, which is in the future. (B) is December 1st, which is later in the same year. So only (E) matches July 1st, 1972.
